description: Danny Nelson discusses the challenges of crypto journalism, emphasizing the need for technical proficiency and understanding of financial markets. He explores the adversarial relationship between the tech industry and journalists, and the complexities of reporting in a space where stakeholders have vested interests.
topic_summary: In this episode, Danny Nelson shares insights on the role of journalism in the crypto ecosystem, the difficulties faced by crypto journalists, and the dynamics between media and the blockchain industry. He highlights the importance of empathy in addressing conflicts of interest and the unique challenges posed by the blending of roles within the crypto space [t=249.71].
